title: CUSTOMER 360°: One Customer. One View. Every Brand. Every Market.
subtitle: Unifying behavioral and transactional data into a scalable, insight-ready C360 platform for Americana Restaurants.
role: Data Engineering, Analytics Architecture, ETL Pipeline Design & Dashboarding
platform: Azure Data Platform + Databricks + Power BI
overview: Americana Restaurants is the largest restaurant operator in the MENA region and Kazakhstan, managing a vast network of restaurants. With customer data streaming from various channels, including in-store POS systems and mobile/web applications, Americana faced significant challenges in converting this data into actionable insights. The data was fragmented across different platforms, making it difficult to get a comprehensive view of customer behavior and drive effective decision-making.

Attributics partnered with Americana to build a unified, scalable analytics platform, transforming data into insights that empower all teams to make faster, data-driven decisions. The solution leveraged a combination of Azure Blob Storage, Databricks, Power BI, and other modern data tools to create an efficient, end-to-end analytics solution.

The primary goal of the project was to gain a deeper understanding of customer behavior across brand markets and shift the conversation from sales to customer-centric insights. Americana aimed to leverage these insights to improve marketing effectiveness, increase profitability, and enhance customer engagement.

challenge.subtitle: Data Silos
challenge.description: Valuable customer transaction and behavioral data was spread across multiple platforms (CleverTap, in-store systems), limiting the ability to perform a holistic analysis of customer journeys.

challenge.subtitle: Lack of Descriptive Dashboards
challenge.description: There were no intuitive visualizations of customer patterns or behaviors that could support data-driven marketing decisions.

challenge.subtitle: Need for Advanced Analysis
challenge.description: Americana needed a solution that could handle complex customer segmentation by factors like purchase frequency, channel preferences, and reactivation rates.

solution.subtitle: Unified Data Lake Architecture
solution.description: Designed a scalable data pipeline using Azure Blob Storage, Databricks, and Delta Tables to centralize and process data from multiple sources into a single analytics platform.

solution.subtitle: End-to-End ETL Pipeline
solution.description: Implemented ETL processes in Databricks to cleanse, transform, and enrich raw data, making it analytics-ready and consistent across all sources.

solution.subtitle: Power BI Analytics Layer
solution.description: Built dynamic dashboards in Power BI using DirectQuery and Import modes to enable both real-time and historical reporting.

solution.subtitle: Advanced Customer Analytics
solution.description: Enabled cohort analysis, retention tracking, cross-channel behavior insights, and segmentation based on frequency, reactivation, and engagement patterns.

solution.subtitle: Self-Service Business Intelligence
solution.description: Empowered business and marketing teams with interactive dashboards, reducing dependency on manual reporting and enabling faster, data-driven decisions.

process.title: Data Ingestion (Bronze Layer)
process.description: Ingested raw data from CleverTap and POS systems (SDM) into Azure Blob Storage in CSV format, establishing a centralized raw data repository.

process.title: Data Processing & Transformation (Silver Layer)
process.description: Used Databricks to perform ETL operations, cleaning, transforming, and enriching data. Stored processed data in Delta Tables for optimized querying and scalability.

process.title: Data Modeling & Storage
process.description: Structured data into Delta Lake format to enable ACID transactions, time travel, and efficient large-scale analytics.

process.title: Analytics & Visualization (Gold Layer)
process.description: Connected Power BI to Databricks using DirectQuery for real-time insights and Import mode for historical analysis. Built dashboards for cross-channel, cross-brand, retention, and engagement metrics.

process.title: Business Enablement
process.description: Delivered self-service dashboards enabling teams to analyze customer behavior, track KPIs, and make faster, data-driven decisions without manual intervention.

techStack.title: Data Storage
techStack.description: Azure Blob Storage (CSV ingestion, Bronze layer)

techStack.title: Data Lakehouse
techStack.description: Delta Tables (ACID transactions, time travel, scalable analytics)

techStack.title: Data Format
techStack.description: Parquet (columnar storage for performance and efficiency)

techStack.title: Analytics & Visualization
techStack.description: Power BI (DirectQuery for real-time, Import mode for historical reporting)

techStack.title: Data Sources
techStack.description: CleverTap, POS Systems (SDM), Mobile & Web Applications

conclusion: This project enabled Americana Restaurants to unlock the potential of its data, transforming it into valuable insights that drive customer-centric strategies. By integrating and processing data in a unified analytics platform, Americana was able to shift from siloed reporting to a more holistic view of customer behavior, ultimately empowering teams to make data-driven decisions that improved marketing effectiveness and business profitability.
